interfaces.interface: <#if network_user\-is\-match\-all?has_content && network_user\-is\-match\-all == true> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/any <#elseif network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id?has_content && network\-inner\-vlan\-id?has_content> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/${network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id}/${network\-inner\-vlan\-id} <#elseif network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id?has_content> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/${network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id} <#else> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/untagged </#if> bbfift:vlan-sub-interface
